nodes.name: Microspingus
nodes.summary: Microspingus（Microspingus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Plain-tailed warbling finch、Rusty-browed warbling finch、Buff-throated warbling finch等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rusty-browed warbling finch
nodes.summary: Rusty-browed warbling finch（Microspingus erythrophrys）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rusty-browed warbling finch。

nodes.name: Rusty-browed warbling finch
nodes.summary: The rusty-browed warbling finch (Microspingus erythrophrys) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina and Bolivia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
